SECTION 1
THE SQUIRREL CLAIMS NO NUTS EXIST ELSEWHERE.

SECTION 2
IT ALSO STATES ONE HOLLOW HOLDS NUTS.

SECTION 3

SECTION 4

SECTION 5

SECTION 6
CONTRADICTION PROVES THIS SQUIRREL IS GRAY.
